evals.prompt: 基于 /path/to/desktop-agent-prd.md、/path/to/ui-spec.md 和 /path/to/frontend-app 输出桌面端 Agent 工作台高保真 preview。这个 UI 后续要让前端完全按真实项目组件实现。
evals.expected_output: Chooses project-native-preview, performs design discovery, creates or proposes an isolated preview route/component, and includes screen-contract.md, component-map.md, implementation-notes.md, screenshots or verification notes, and migration boundary.

assertions.text: Selects project-native-preview instead of standalone HTML when a frontend project path and implementation intent are provided.
Documents discovered UI constraints from the real project before visual implementation.
Includes screen contract, component map, and implementation notes.
Explains preview isolation and preview-to-production conversion.

evals.prompt: 把这个桌面工作台 PRD 做成视觉 handoff，暂时不要改真实项目，但开发要能知道每个区域复用什么组件。需要一个可打开的 HTML 辅助确认。
evals.expected_output: Chooses visual-handoff, creates high-fidelity visual reference plus mandatory component map and implementation notes, and clearly labels standalone HTML as visual reference rather than production code.

assertions.text: Selects visual-handoff mode.
Provides a component map that references production components/styles or marks new components needed.
Labels HTML as visual reference and states migration limitations.

evals.prompt: 我还在早期讨论，只想快速看下桌面端布局是否合理。请用一个 standalone HTML 做概念稿，不需要开发直接复用。
evals.expected_output: Chooses concept-html, keeps output lightweight, includes screen contract and assumptions, and does not overstate implementation reusability.

assertions.text: Selects concept-html mode.
Does not require component map or implementation notes as mandatory outputs for this early concept-only run.
States that the HTML is concept-only and not a production implementation.

evals.prompt: 这里有 PRD、线上截图和前端项目路径，但项目本地启动失败了。请继续给高保真 UI handoff，要求说明哪些是静态推断。
evals.expected_output: Attempts or records project inspection, marks unavailable runtime evidence, uses static inference cautiously, and avoids claiming production match without evidence.

assertions.text: Records that the project could not be fully run or inspected.
Marks static-inference assumptions and confidence limits.
Still includes screen contract, component map, and implementation notes for handoff.

evals.prompt: PRD 已经确认了，现在要让前端完全复刻这个 UI。你需要输出能指导开发的内容，不要只给一个 HTML。
evals.expected_output: Treats the task as implementation-oriented, refuses to use standalone HTML as the sole deliverable, and outputs the full implementation handoff contract.

assertions.text: Does not deliver HTML as the only artifact.
Includes component mapping, state coverage, implementation notes, and verification requirements.
Explains which parts are reusable and which are visual-only.

evals.prompt: 从这份桌面端 Agent PRD 开始，先输出 UI 结构、状态模型和 ASCII 布局，确认结构后再继续做高保真 visual handoff。
evals.expected_output: Treats wireframe as the first stage of the ui-mockup workflow, produces structure-stage deliverables before visual handoff, includes a structure review gate, then continues or pauses based on confirmation needs.

assertions.text: Produces or requires screen inventory, state model, and ASCII layout before high-fidelity visuals.
Includes a structure review gate or clearly states why it continues without waiting.
Keeps ui-wireframe-to-html as a structure-stage discipline rather than a competing high-fidelity skill.
Still includes screen contract, component map, and implementation notes when moving into visual handoff.

evals.prompt: 帮我写一份桌面端 Agent 工作台 PRD，先不要做 UI mockup。
evals.expected_output: Routes to prd-architect or states that PRD drafting should happen before ui-mockup-desktop-workbench. Does not produce visual mockup deliverables.

assertions.text: Does not treat PRD drafting as a ui-mockup-desktop-workbench task.
Routes or recommends prd-architect for PRD creation.
Does not output component map, HTML mockup, or project-native preview.

evals.prompt: 只审一下这个 PRD 有没有问题，从研发和测试视角挑缺口。
evals.expected_output: Routes to prd-review or states that PRD review should happen before formal mockup. Does not generate UI artifacts.

assertions.text: Does not treat PRD review as a ui-mockup-desktop-workbench task.
Routes or recommends prd-review.
Does not generate high-fidelity UI artifacts.

evals.prompt: 做一个手机端营销 landing page，视觉要漂亮一点。
evals.expected_output: Does not use ui-mockup-desktop-workbench because the task is mobile/marketing rather than desktop workbench handoff. Routes to a frontend/design flow if needed.

assertions.text: Rejects or avoids ui-mockup-desktop-workbench routing for mobile landing page work.
Explains that this Skill is for desktop workbench UI handoff, not marketing pages.

evals.prompt: 直接实现这个生产功能并补测试，不需要视觉确认。
evals.expected_output: Does not use ui-mockup-desktop-workbench as an implementation workflow. Routes to engineering planning or implementation flow.

assertions.text: Does not treat production implementation and tests as a mockup task.
Routes to implementation planning or engineering execution rather than visual handoff.
Does not claim mockup artifacts are production code.
